channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran will completely close strait of Hormuz if Trump acts on infrastructure threats, says IRG - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Iran will completely close strait of Hormuz if Trump acts on infrastructure threats, says IRG  The Guardian
  2. Live updates: Iran vows to ‘irreversibly’ destroy infrastructure after Trump’s ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz  CNN
  3. Trump Threatens to ‘Obliterate’ Iran's Power Plants If Strait of Hormuz Stays Closed  Time Magazine
  4. Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Vows to Destroy Key Infrastructure After Trump's Power Plant Threat  The New York Times
  5. Trump, Iran threaten to escalate conflict with attacks on energy and water facilities  Reuters

item.title: Aftermath of Iranian missile strikes near Israel’s nuclear facility - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Aftermath of Iranian missile strikes near Israel’s nuclear facility  Al Jazeera
  2. Iran attacks near Israeli nuclear site, fires long-range missiles for first time  Reuters

  4. Residents in Southern Israel Are Shaken After Direct Strikes by Iranian Missiles  The New York Times
  5. Iran strikes near Israeli nuclear research center as Trump threatens attacks on Iranian power plants  Politico

item.title: Israel Orders Military to Intensify Demolitions in Southern Lebanon - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Israel Orders Military to Intensify Demolitions in Southern Lebanon  The New York Times

  4. IDF warns it will bomb another bridge on Litani, citing Hezbollah terror activities  The Times of Israel
  5. 'Gaza model': Netanyahu, Katz instruct IDF to strike bridges, homes in southern Lebanon  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: After 25 years of socialist rule, where does Paris go now? - CNN
item.description:
1. After 25 years of socialist rule, where does Paris go now?  CNN

  4. Socialists battle to hold Paris as France holds mayoral elections  BBC

item.title: Why Iran does not appear ready to give in, despite heavy losses - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Why Iran does not appear ready to give in, despite heavy losses  The Washington Post
  2. Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be 'completely closed' if Trump delivers on threat to strike power plants  BBC

  4. Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships  Reuters
  5. War in Iran Reveals Strait of Hormuz’s Weakness as an Oil Bottleneck  The New York Times

item.title: Britain sees no evidence that Iran is targeting Europe with missiles - Reuters
item.description:
1. Britain sees no evidence that Iran is targeting Europe with missiles  Reuters
  2. Iran Brings Europe Into Range With Missiles Fired at Diego Garcia  WSJ
  3. Did Iran launch missiles at US-UK base on Diego Garcia? Here’s what to know  Al Jazeera
  4. Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities  CNN
  5. Iran fires missiles at remote U.K.-U.S. base, claiming long-range capabilities it previously denied  NBC News

item.title: Exclusive: Judges clear ICC’s Karim Khan over sexual misconduct claims - Middle East Eye
item.description:

item.title: Iran war's economic shocks could reverberate for a while - Axios
item.description:

item.title: In Cuba, a 'Solidarity Caravan' Has Arrived - Newser

item.title: Three weeks in, Iran war appears to have escalated beyond Trump’s control - The Times of Israel
item.description:

item.title: Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It? - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Iran says Natanz nuclear site was hit in US-Israeli attack - Euronews.com
item.description:
1. Iran says Natanz nuclear site was hit in US-Israeli attack  Euronews.com

  3. US and Iran trade threats of expanding war after strikes near Israeli areas tied to nuclear sites  ABC7 Chicago
  4. Russia says attacks on Iran's uranium enrichment facilities violate international law  Anadolu Ajansı
  5. Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility  Al Jazeera
